items.title: The United States wants to completely ban the import of Russian uranium - ИА Ореанда-Новости
items.blurb: RIA Novosti: a new bill in the United States completely prohibits the import of uranium from the Russian Federation

items.title: Nuclear Energy Stocks Tied To India’s Power Buildout Investors May Want To Watch

items.title: MEP Virgil Popescu announces that the European Commission will redirect 200 million euros through the InvestEU program for the development of small modular reactors (SMR)
ČEZ starts process to extend Temelín operation to 80 years
items.blurb: The two units at the Czech Republic's Temelín Nuclear Power Plant will operate to 2080 and 2082 respectively, under plans to extend their operating lives to 80 years.
